memberdef.argsstring: (TSharedRef< T > const &Payload, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FDateTime const &ClientTimestamp=FDateTime::UtcNow())
memberdef.name: SendGameStandardEventData

briefdescription.para: Send/enqueue a single authorized telemetry data of a game standard event. Server should be logged in.

parameterdescription.para: The data to be send, each event expected to have different payload body, see Models/AccelByteGameStandardEventModels.h
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Timestamp when the event is triggered, the default will be FDateTime::UtcNow()

memberdef.argsstring: (TSharedRef< FAccelByteModelsCachedGameStandardEventPayload > const &Payload, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FDateTime const &ClientTimestamp=FDateTime::UtcNow())
memberdef.name: SendGameStandardEventData

briefdescription.para: Send game standard telemetry data securely and the server should be logged in first.
